title: 8 Herbal Creams For Hair Fall
description: Zingiber officinale creams contains active constituents like gingerol and shogaol, which are responsible for its hair growth-promoting properties. These compounds help reduce inflammation in the scalp, a common cause of hair loss. Ginger's anti-inflammatory properties also increase blood flow to the scalp, promoting hair growth by nourishing the hair follicles.
